brand.title: Brand
brand.description: The SITE/store the shopper is on. ALWAYS pass @variables.brand verbatim ('Kwitko Coffee' or 'Bean & Brew'); scopes the catalog (Kwitko=coffee, Bean & Brew=equipment). Leave blank only if @variables.brand is empty.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Use chat for the website concierge.

dislikeKeywordsCsv.title: Dislike Keywords
dislikeKeywordsCsv.description: Comma-separated words to never recommend by name, e.g. decaf,flavored. Build this from the shopper's saved/stated dislikes.

email.title: Email
email.description: Optional. Leave blank for anonymous storefront recommendations; pass only when the shopper is signed in or voluntarily shared email.

excludeProductIdsCsv.title: Exclude Product Ids
excludeProductIdsCsv.description: Comma-separated product ids the shopper already rejected.

preferredBeanType.title: Preferred Bean Type
preferredBeanType.description: HARD filter: Single-Origin or Blend. Pass from the shopper's saved/stated beanType.

preferredBrewStyle.title: Preferred Brew Style
preferredBrewStyle.description: HARD filter: Espresso, Cold Brew, or All-Purpose.

preferredFamily.title: Preferred Family
preferredFamily.description: Bias the pick toward this product family, e.g. Single-Origin or Espresso, based on what the shopper asked for.

preferredRoast.title: Preferred Roast
preferredRoast.description: HARD filter: Light, Medium, or Dark. Pass from the shopper's saved/stated roast.

wantsDecaf.title: Wants Decaf
wantsDecaf.description: true = ONLY decaf, false = ONLY regular. Leave unset when unknown.
